dependent_vars.definition: member primary p consumed from pinned analysis-output.json files by sha256 (P2 §5.4)
dependent_vars.name: member_primary_p

n_planned.correction: Holm at alpha=0.05 over the 8 fixed members; a member not read out = non-rejection (conservative)

endpoints.test: Holm at α=0.05 over the 8 fixed member primaries; family-wise decisions feed a-h0; non-read-out members are non-rejections

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: P1 §4b row H0 (verbatim): Measured range: 135M–1.7B (+3B repl.). Envelope: Verdict valid 135M–7B-class only; nothing at frontier without Tier 5. Anchor: No published scaling law covers kernel-type interventions; disjunction inherits the tightest surviving member's envelope.
kill_criterion_verbatim: P8 §1.4 F-H0 row (verbatim): 'Primaries of {HC1, HC2, HE1–HE6} — the 8 members fixed at freeze, never data-dependently selected (RT-13); Holm at α=0.05 over the 8 fixed members; a member not read out is scored as a non-rejection (not dropped from the family).' PASS/FAIL here are the family-wise any-rejection reading only; route-level meaning lives in a-h0.

corpus_hashes._recipe: sha256 over the sorted concatenation of '<relpath>:<file-sha256>\n' lines for every file under data/<corpus>/

title: family-h0 — the F-H0 cross-experiment Holm family record (P8 §1.4 C-3, RT-13): 8 pre-declared members fixed at freeze {HC1, HC2, HE1..HE6 primaries}; non-read-out members scored as NON-REJECTIONS, never dropped; must freeze BEFORE a-h0 freezes
